Older Opus version. Not on current Anthropic pricing page; Venice still resells it (model is API-accessible). Verify direct pricing from archive.org or docs.anthropic.com history.
Older Opus version, marked Beta on Venice's resold listing. Not on current Anthropic pricing page. Verify direct pricing.

OpenAI positions as 'a more affordable model for coding and professional work.' No separate cache-write charge. Standard processing mode pricing.
OpenAI positions as 'our strongest mini model yet for coding, computer use, and subagents.' Standard processing mode pricing.
Pro tier variant. Not on current flagship pricing page. Venice resells at $37.50/$225 with overage tier. Verify direct pricing.

OpenAI positions as 'a new class of intelligence for coding and professional work.' No separate cache-write price; regular input rate applies on first read, with discounted reads thereafter. Standard processing mode; batch is 50% off and data residency adds 10%.
Pro tier of flagship. Not on the current main pricing page. Venice resells at $37.50/$225. Verify direct pricing.
Standard tier pricing. Batch and Flex modes are 50% off ($0.25/$1.50). Priority mode is $0.90/$5.40. Free tier available.
Tiered pricing: rates double above 200K input tokens. Batch and Flex are 50% off. Priority is 80% premium.
Standard tier. Batch and Flex are 50% off. Priority is $2.70/$16.20. Context cache storage billed per Mtok per hour.
xAI's docs do not specify cache pricing or tiered context pricing. 1M token context.
xAI ships reasoning and non-reasoning variants under the same price; both covered by this entry. Cache pricing not specified.
Multi-agent variant of Grok 4.20. Same per-token pricing.
Build-focused variant. 256K context.
Venice resells Anthropic's Fable 5. Markup applies.
